summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of MediaHub MVP completed. All 15 pytest backend tests passed and all 13 frontend Playwright scenarios passed against the public preview URL.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('shutdown'); migrate to lifespan handlers for FastAPI >= 0.110 to silence deprecation warnings.

PUT /api/admin/profiles/{id} drops any field set to None even if intended (model_dump(exclude_unset=True) is correct, but the extra `if v is not None` filter could swallow legitimate falsy values in future; safe for current schema).
MASTER_PASSCODE default fallback '1115' is hardcoded in server.py; fine for MVP but should be removed once env-driven config is mandatory.
CORS allow_origins is '*' with allow_credentials=True which the browser will block in some scenarios; for MVP no auth this is harmless but worth tightening before production.
test_credentials: Master admin passcode: 1115. Test profile passcode used: 1234. /app/memory/test_credentials.md was not present (no test users needed for this MVP since no auth).
seed_data_creation: Created 1 profile during frontend e2e (name 'Demo' -> renamed 'DemoEdited') and deleted at end of test. Backend tests use TEST_ prefix and clean up via teardown fixture.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers health, admin verify, validation (header missing, bad passcode, bad color), full CRUD with create->GET verification, public vs admin listing, profile passcode verify and post-delete 404. Frontend Playwright script covered: home title + gear, /admin wrong-passcode rejection, 1115 -> dashboard, create profile (name/passcode/color/icon/2 sections), edit name persists, home card appears, passcode dialog wrong->shake/keep open & correct->/profile/{id}, ProfileShell name+tabs+placeholder+exit, delete via trash + confirm dialog, empty state with admin link. Note: section-tab- selector matched 4 elements in shell for 2 sections (likely each tab has a button + indicator child both bearing the testid); functionally fine. Keypad auto-submits 120ms after 4th digit; allow >=300ms before asserting navigation.
